system_info.title: Euro Trade Strategy Rules Engine Specification
system_info.description: Comprehensive reference guide of all technical indicators, chart patterns, candlestick formations, market structures, and session filters supported by the Euro Trade signals engine.

syntax_rules.strategy_format: The strategy uploaded from the admin panel to configs/strategy_standard or configs/strategy_vip must be a single JSON object wrapping the rules inside a 'rules' array. Optionally, a 'pyramid' object can be included.

pyramid.wait_message: الهرم لم يكتمل — انتظار الشمعة القادمة

global_parameters.condition: String (Comparison operator to evaluate indicator output)
global_parameters.score: Double (Points assigned if condition is met)
global_parameters.role: String (Optional. Use 'primary' for direction-defining rules, 'confirm' for stage-2 checks, 'filter' for hard gating in Pyramid mode, or '' empty for standard scoring)
global_parameters.period: Integer (Optional, defaults to 14. Used for indicator lookbacks)
global_parameters.fast: Integer (Optional, defaults to 9. Fast period for MACD or EMA cross)
global_parameters.slow: Integer (Optional, defaults to 21. Slow period for MACD or EMA cross)
global_parameters.smooth: Integer (Optional, defaults to 3. Smoothing factor for Stochastic)
global_parameters.stddev: Double (Optional, defaults to 2.0. Bollinger Bands standard deviation multiplier)
global_parameters.value: Double (Optional constant value to compare against)
global_parameters.pattern: String (Optional. Specifies patterns like candle patterns, waves, sessions, or custom targets)

oscillators.output: Double (K - D difference. Positive = bullish cross, Negative = bearish cross)
oscillators.description: Stochastic K line minus D line cross value.

trend_following.output: Double (Fast EMA minus Slow EMA. Positive = bullish trend, Negative = bearish trend)

trend_following.description: SuperTrend trend indicator. Use 'value' to pass multiplier (default is 3.0).

trend_following.output: Double (1.0 for bullish, -1.0 for bearish, 0.0 neutral)

trend_following.description: Market trend classification using Dow Theory swing points.

volatility_and_bands.output: Double (ATR value in price unit, e.g. 0.00045)
Double (Percentage location. 0 = lower band, 100 = upper band, 50 = middle. Can go below 0 or above 100)
volatility_and_bands.description: Current price position relative to Bollinger Bands.

volatility_and_bands.output: Double (1.0 bullish breakout, -1.0 bearish breakdown, 0.0 inside bands)
Double (1.0 breakout high, -1.0 breakdown low, 0.0 inside)

volume_and_liquidity.output: Double (Volume delta - buying pressure vs selling pressure)
Double (Ratio of current volume to average volume)
volume_and_liquidity.description: Volume Ratio. Values > 1.0 indicate above average volume.
Volume Weighted Average Price. Note: Do not compare vwap directly with 0; use price_vs_vwap for cross strategies.

volume_and_liquidity.output: Double (Current Price minus VWAP. Positive = Price above VWAP, Negative = Price below VWAP)
volume_and_liquidity.description: Distance between Price and VWAP. Perfect for cross strategies (gt 0 for CALL, lt 0 for PUT).

volume_and_liquidity.output: Double (0 to 100, closeness to order book liquidity zones)

support_resistance_and_liquidity_zones.output: Double (1.0 bullish gap, -1.0 bearish gap, 0.0 none)

japanese_candlestick_patterns.description: Matches exact professional patterns using condition='eq' and setting pattern='<name>'
Advanced candlestick pattern engine. Valid patterns to match:

japanese_candlestick_patterns.output: Double (1.0 bullish inside bar, -1.0 bearish inside bar, 0.0 none)
Double (1.0 bullish outside bar, -1.0 bearish outside bar, 0.0 none)
Double (1.0 bullish fakey, -1.0 bearish fakey, 0.0 none)
Double (1.0 bullish institutional candle, -1.0 bearish, 0.0 none)

ict_smc_smart_money.output: String
ict_smc_smart_money.description: SMC market structure swing status. Valid returned values:

chart_patterns_harmonic_fibonacci.description: Fibonacci retracement level rejection. Specify level in 'value' (e.g. 0.618). Returns:
Alternate Bat Harmonic Pattern (alias of bat).
Deep Crab Harmonic Pattern (alias of crab).

chart_patterns_harmonic_fibonacci.output: Double (1.0 if RSI divergence is bullish, -1.0 if bearish, 0.0 otherwise)
chart_patterns_harmonic_fibonacci.description: RSI divergence detector. Match gt 0 for CALL, lt 0 for PUT.
Elliott Wave identifier. Specify wave to match in 'pattern' parameter. Valid pattern waves: '1', '2', '3', '5', 'B', 'C'.

time_and_sessions.description: Time session active window filter. Set target session in 'pattern'. Valid target sessions: 'london_newyork_overlap', 'london', 'new_york', 'tokyo'. Defaults to 'london_newyork_overlap'.

time_and_sessions.output: Double (1.0 if current candle is the session open candle, 0.0 otherwise)
Double (1.0 if inside opening range period, 0.0 otherwise)
Double (1.0 bullish gap, -1.0 bearish gap, 0.0 none)

statistical_and_quantitative.output: Double (Hurst Exponent, < 0.5 mean reverting, > 0.5 trending, 0.5 random walk)
Double (1.0 trending market, -1.0 mean-reverting market, 0.0 sideways)
Double (1.0 high vol expansion, -1.0 low vol compression, 0.0 neutral)

adaptive_and_advanced_mas.description: Chande Kroll Stop. Use 'value' to pass ATR multiplier (default 1.5).

adaptive_and_advanced_mas.output: Double (Current price offset from VWAP bands)
